---
name: feedback_kol_dedup_check
description: Read context/kol-exclusion-list.md at session start for dedup — never fetch Notion directly for this
type: feedback
---

Before any KOL discovery work begins, read `context/kol-exclusion-list.md`. Every handle listed there is hard-excluded from the session — skip immediately if found, regardless of what the brief says.

**Why:** Fetching the Notion database via search caps at 25 results per query, causing missed records and duplicates. `kol-exclusion-list.md` is generated by `node tools/sync-kol-list.js` which uses the Notion REST API with full pagination — always complete, never capped.

**How to apply:** Step 0 of every KOL session — read `context/kol-exclusion-list.md` and load all handles into the in-memory exclusion list. Do not query Notion for this. After writing a new KOL to Notion, also append the handle to the in-memory list immediately (the file itself is refreshed by re-running the sync script at the next session start).
